title: hearth.kb.article.saved v1
description: Fired by hearth-api after a deer-flow research cycle result is persisted to the KB YAML store at ~/projects/kb/home-automation/. Android subscribes via nbus SSE to update the knowledge chunk counter and show a snackbar. Producer: hearth-api/nbus_consumer.rs::handle_research_cycle_completed (after successful tokio::fs::write). Consumer: Android app (KnowledgeScreen live counter, snackbar notification).

research_id.description: Required. Stable identifier for the research task that produced this article.

cycle_id.description: Required. Identifier for the specific research cycle whose result was persisted.

kb_path.description: Required. Absolute path on disk where the YAML article was written (e.g. /home/user/projects/kb/home-automation/some-topic.yaml).

source.description: Required. The nervous-bus event that triggered this write — always 'deer-flow.research.cycle.completed.v1'.

title.description: Optional. The original research question, used as snackbar text on Android.

chunk_count.description: Optional. Number of KB chunks written in this save operation — typically 1.
